name: multi-agent-workflows
description: Parallel and subagent-driven execution workflows for Codex, including task-level orchestration and isolated prompt templates.

interface.longDescription: A standalone Codex plugin for multi-agent work. It bundles parallel investigation guidance and subagent-driven implementation with prompt templates for implementer, spec-review, and task-review loops.
defaultPrompt: Use subagent-driven development for this plan
Split these independent failures across parallel agents
Run this implementation through a multi-agent workflow
